facts.claim: Serenade of the Seas offers you to take in the wild views from the top of the rock climbing wall or dig into delicious dining from around the world. Discover electrifying nightlife that keeps the thrills going long after sunset.
Dive into new discoveries as you sail onboard Serenade of the Seas®.
GTS Serenade of the Seas is a Radiance-class cruise ship operated by Royal Caribbean International.
